Off Calendar Feb-26-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, DAVID CHIU'S Notice Of Non-Parties The City And City Attorney David Chiu'S Motion For A Protective Order Preventing Plaintiff From Taking City Attorney Chiu'S Deposition No opposition filed; motion granted. The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem David McDonald at davididaho14@gmail.com.
